title: Malaysian Shrimp Paella
description: A flavorful and spicy paella dish with succulent shrimp, crunchy vegetables, and a hint of Malaysian spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add shrimp and cook until pink, about 2 minutes.
Add crunchy vegetables and cook for 3 minutes.
Stir in Malaysian chili paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add Xtra rice and stir to coat with oil.
Add Paella chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes.
Fluff rice with a fork and serve.
